description_long: This is a single-carriage urban train with a rectangular, elongated body and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily dark red with black and teal accents, featuring a series of evenly spaced rectangular windows along both sides. There are multiple doors distributed evenly along the length of the carriage, each marked with a distinct X-pattern. The undercarriage includes visible wheels and suspension components, suggesting it is designed for rail transport. The front and rear ends are flat, with the front featuring a small window and headlight details. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for public transportation in city environments.
description: A dark red, single-carriage urban train with evenly spaced windows and doors, black and teal accents, and visible undercarriage wheels. The design is functional and suited for city rail transit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the train, with all windows and doors visible, as well as the undercarriage wheels.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat face of the train, a small window, and headlight details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the same arrangement of windows, doors, and wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view with a flat end, similar to the front but lacking headlight details.
